description: Classic yet stylish, the Soqua slip-on from reebok is an absolutely trendy shoe. It comes with a high traction outsole which makes your long walks all the more comfortable.Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Upper with geometric graphics Elastane strip between the upper and the sides to facilitate comfortable slipping on Lightly padded collar for snug Fit Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Herringbone pattern outsole for superior grip on all terrains Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
